LAW AND MOTION 301, REAL PARTY IN INTEREST K.I.S.S. ENTERTAINMENT, INC.'S DEMURRER TO STATE COMPENSATION INSURANCE FUND'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/PROHIBITION/CERTIFICATION WAS ARGUED AND TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON 05/28/04. RULING: SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND; THE PETITION FOR PEREMPTORY WRIT OF MANDAMUS IS DISMISSED; THAT PETITIONER TAKE NOTHING BY THESE PROCEEDINGS AND REAL PARTY IN INTEREST SHALL RECOVER ITS COSTS OF SUIT. HON. JAMES L. WARREN; COURT REPORTER CHRISTINA PAXTON CSR 1558
